author: Ethan
name: Int6 Late Bank QAT + 2048 Context
blurb: Late QAT applied to parameter bank weights (Q, K, V, O, MLP up/down) during warmdown via _fq_bank() STE fake-quant. Previous work only applied QAT to CastedLinear layers (~5% of weights). Bank QAT activates at lr_scale < 0.15, after the model is converged, so full-precision training is preserved for the first 85% of steps. MLP_MULT=2.75 brings artifact under 16MB. Context 2048 for ~7200 steps in 10min.
